title: Firework Trades
description: Adds Firework Trades to the Fletcher.
body:
# Adds Firework Trades

- Fletcher (Level 2) - 32x Dura 1 Fireworks for 15 Emeralds.
- Fletcher (Level 3) - 24x Dura 2 Fireworks for 20 Emeralds.
- Fletcher (Level 4) - 16x Dura 3 Fireworks for 25 Emeralds.

DM jamie.local on discord, or join our server, to suggest ports to different versions of the game.
